# Third-party sources

## awesome-cursor-skills

Git submodule: [spencerpauly/awesome-cursor-skills](https://github.com/spencerpauly/awesome-cursor-skills).

Initialize or update after clone:

```bash
git submodule update --init --recursive
```

Update to latest upstream:

```bash
cd third_party/awesome-cursor-skills && git pull origin main && cd ../.. && git add third_party/awesome-cursor-skills && git commit -m "chore: bump awesome-cursor-skills submodule"
```
